rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to register or sign in to access the platform.
The system shall enable users to search for products after they have registered or logged in.
The system shall display matching product results based on the user's search query.
The system shall allow users to apply filters to refine their search results.
The system shall update the displayed product results based on the applied filters.
The system shall allow users to select a product from search or filtered results.
The system shall redirect the user to the official website of the selected product upon selection.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can register or sign in to access the platform.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user enters the platform by registering or signing in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After registration or login, users can search for products.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once access is granted, the user searches for a product, and the system displays the matching results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system displays matching product results based on the user's search query.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once access is granted, the user searches for a product, and the system displays the matching results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can apply filters to refine their search results.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After viewing the search results, the user may choose to apply filters to narrow down the options. When filters are applied, the system shows the refined results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system updates the displayed product results based on the applied filters.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When filters are applied, the system shows the refined results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can select a product from search or filtered results.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can select a product either directly from the search results or after viewing the filtered results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon selecting a product, the system redirects the user to the official website of the selected product.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once a product is selected, the system retrieves the product from the official website and redirects the user there.
